eyebrow: Land Degradation Resources Africa | Data, Documents & Tools
heading: Resources
description: Access documents, presentations, GIS datasets, and multimedia resources on land degradation in Africa. Explore LDN methodologies and SDG 15.3.1 materials.
tagline: Access knowledge. Explore resources. Support action.
intro1: This section provides a comprehensive collection of resources on land degradation monitoring in Africa, supporting research, policy development, and implementation of Land Degradation Neutrality (LDN) and SDG 15.3.1.
intro2: It brings together technical documentation, geospatial data, and communication materials to facilitate knowledge sharing and capacity building across the continent.
